sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88213" key="propai/deusis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προπαίδ-ευσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4018.tlg001:134:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ascl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Metaph.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">134.12</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
